title: Soft Weather
description: Makes rain and snow less visually obtrusive.
body: **Soft Weather** is a resource pack that tones down the visual pollution of both rain and snow. This is done by granting both textures a pinch of transparency, and gently reducing the snowflake counts. This results in weather that is hopefully more atmospheric, instead of irritating. No need to rush to your bed to get rid of weather anymore - just enjoy the climate! ## Versions This resource pack works for all versions of Minecraft starting from version **1.6.1**, until latest. If the folder structure ever breaks this pack, an update will be released to fix it. Versions prior to **1.19.4** will state it's incompatible, but it will work regardless. ## Permissions You are allowed to use this resource pack in your modpack, server or other Minecraft-related project.
